chain.thought: The question is asking to identify which political lieutenant had John George Diefenbaker as their party leader. Since each row represents a political lieutenant and their corresponding party leader, we need to look for the row where the "party leader" column matches "john george diefenbaker". The political lieutenant who had their party leader as John George Diefenbaker was Léon Balcer.
